explanation: Replaced quotes with escaped backslashes for path normalization and used short syntax for the registry key.
Used alternative syntax for the registry hive (HKLM: instead of HKLM\) and preserved the rest of the command structure.
Removed quotes around the registry key path and used escaped backslashes for path normalization.
Reordered the command line arguments in a way that is still accepted by reg.exe while maintaining the same functionality.
Used environment variables to represent parts of the registry path, which can bypass detection based on string matching.
